'''Grugosh''' was a large [[Color/Legends|green]]-skinned [[Alien/Legends|alien]]. He was the partner of the conman [[Vundar]] who was the brains to Grugosh's muscle.

Grugosh supported the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and acted as a mediator between local rebel cells and potential new recruits.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=New Recruits and Rebel Guns|book=Instant Adventures}} {{1st}}
